Let's first dive into what exactly apartment IQ is and what it does.
So apartment IQ is a data analytic tool that streamlines and centralizes the market survey process.
We collect our data from 100% public sources most of the time this is landlord sites.
So property management sites where rent a potential renters can go and apply for a unit, we see live leasing there with uh unit level pricing insights.
Uh and we collect that data daily.
So you're really getting the most up to date information here.
Nothing has to be um edited added.
Uh Everything is automatic.
So you're not having to go in there and make changes to data.

Uh It's updated daily, as I mentioned, without human error, we track most of the big competitors out there in the market, meaning that you can track uh your most uh relevant comps uh and really change and request different comps as necessary.

We offer 100% unlimited access, meaning you can have as many users on this account as necessary, which really ensures that people who are on site all the way up to corporate users can really have access and insight into what's happening in your market.
So ultimately, the tool's goal is to help save you time and really optimize your revenue potential.
